recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Children...
recommendations.overview: On March 26, 1991, five boys set off to the mountain to go frog hunting and never come back to their family. While a documentary producer, detective and professor try to solve the mystery of the incident, one of the boys' parents is a suspect.
